title: Ecto: query
description: An Ecto repository ran a database query. The event_type comes from the repo telemetry_prefix, so [:my_app, :repo, :query] becomes "my_app.repo.query". Honeybadger skips transaction bookkeeping, schema migrations, and Oban job table queries by default.

query.description: Obfuscated SQL with bind parameters replaced by ?.
examples: SELECT u0."id", u0."email", u0."name" FROM "users" AS u0 WHERE (u0."id" = $?)

query_time.description: Time spent executing the query in microseconds.

decode_time.description: Time spent decoding the result in microseconds.

queue_time.description: Time spent waiting for a database connection in microseconds.

total_time.description: Total time including queue, query, and decode in microseconds.

stacktrace.description: Formatted call stack at query time. Present when include_stacktrace is true and the repo has stacktrace enabled.

params.description: Query parameters. Present when include_params is true.

request_id.description: Request ID from the current EventContext.

idle_time.description: Time the connection spent idle before the query in microseconds.
